name: SBI Prime Credit Card

fees.waiverCondition: Spend ₹3,00,000 or more in the previous year

categoryRates.description: 5X Reward Points on dining transactions (5 RP per ₹100)
5X Reward Points on departmental store purchases (5 RP per ₹100)
2X Reward Points on all online transactions (2 RP per ₹100)
1 Reward Point per ₹100 on all other transactions

redemptionOptions: Gift vouchers from SBI Card catalogue

welcomeBenefits.condition: On spending ₹5,000 within 60 days of card issuance

milestoneBenefits.benefit: Additional e-gift voucher worth ₹3,000 + annual fee waiver

additionalBenefits: 8 domestic + 2 international lounge visits per year
Air accident insurance cover of ₹50 lakh
Higher fuel surcharge waiver cap of ₹500/month
Concierge services for travel and lifestyle
EMI conversion facility on large purchases
pros: Welcome benefit of ₹3,000 effectively makes the first year free
8 domestic + 2 international lounge visits is generous for the fee
5X rewards on dining and departmental stores cover lifestyle spending
Achievable ₹3 lakh waiver threshold for annual fee
Air accident insurance of ₹50 lakh adds peace of mind
cons: Reward point value of ₹0.25 per point is on the lower side
Only 2X on online spends — lower than many competing cards
3.5% foreign currency markup despite having international lounge access
Many common categories excluded from earning rewards
idealFor: Lifestyle spenders who dine out frequently and shop at departmental stores
Users looking for a premium card with solid lounge access at a reasonable fee
Those who want a well-rounded card with milestone benefits and insurance

faqs.question: How does the welcome benefit work?
faqs.answer: You receive e-vouchers worth ₹3,000 when you spend ₹5,000 within 60 days of card issuance. This effectively makes the first year free as the voucher value matches the joining fee.

faqs.question: How many lounge visits do I get?
faqs.answer: You get 8 complimentary domestic airport lounge visits and 2 international lounge visits per year through the Visa lounge program.

faqs.question: What is the annual fee waiver condition?
faqs.answer: The ₹2,999 annual fee is waived if your total annual spends exceed ₹3,00,000 in the previous year.

faqs.question: Is there air accident insurance?
faqs.answer: Yes, the card provides air accident insurance cover of ₹50 lakh when flight tickets are purchased using the card.
